case_title: CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. VS. 250 VN POOL LLC

docket_entries.description: REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 7/29/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,645.16 FILED BY CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT 250 VN POOL LLC DBA DA VINCI VILLA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-29-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF CHALLENGE DAIRY PRODUCTS, INC. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT . NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE
